# DevPulse

> Type any GitHub username and see how they work: contribution heatmap, streaks,
> a playful developer archetype, top projects, primary languages, and recent
> public activity. Public data only, no login.

DevPulse is a free, open-source, client-side web app. Given a GitHub username it
fetches public data (profile, contribution calendar, public events, repository
languages) and renders an interactive report: an all-time contribution heatmap,
current and longest streaks, a derived "developer archetype" (e.g. The Shipper,
The Guardian), top projects, top languages, and a day-by-day activity feed. Two
users can be compared side by side. An optional GitHub token unlocks accurate
last-year stats via the GraphQL API; the token stays in the browser session and
is sent only to api.github.com.

## Pages
- Home / app: https://chemaclass.github.io/devpulse/
- Per-user report: https://chemaclass.github.io/devpulse/?u=USERNAME

## Source
- Repository: https://github.com/Chemaclass/devpulse
- License: see repository
